title: Degraded
brief: Mid-mission, FA re-advertises a tightened envelope: the minimum airspeed climbs. Re-read MA_FlightCapabilityMT and loiter at the NEW floor — a brain that cached the boot numbers gets rejected.
teaches: The performance envelope is live, not a boot-time fact. FA republishes MA_FlightCapabilityMT when conditions change; commands are validated against the latest envelope. Read the re-advertised MinAirspeed to slow into the zone; a hardcoded boot value is rejected PERFORMANCE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED and you blow through the station.

objective._doc: reach-hold at a far station (-2400,0) @ 3000 m. The win needs a slow loiter to dwell in the zone; mid-mission (tick 14) the envelope tightens (MinAirspeed 20 -> 30), so the loiter speed must be read from the re-advert. A cached 20 is rejected and the vehicle never slows enough to hold.
